title: Hoi An、Quang Nam — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Hoi An、Quang Nam的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Hoi An是Quang Nam的一个城市，人口约120,000。A UNESCO World Heritage ancient town with beautifully preserved architecture, lantern-lit streets, and a thriving expat community drawn to its charm and affordable lifestyle.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
